# Pristine Clean

Pristine Clean is a Filipina-run house cleaning business serving the Sacramento, California area.

## Services

- Standard house cleaning
- Deep cleaning
- Move-in cleaning
- Move-out cleaning
- Kitchen cleaning
- Bathroom cleaning
- Recurring weekly, biweekly, and monthly cleaning

## Business positioning

Pristine Clean focuses on attentive detail, reliable communication, warm customer service, and creating a happy, peaceful home.

## Service area

Sacramento, California and surrounding communities.

## Contact

Phone: 530-762-9826
Email: brandon.tinder@gmail.com
